coach_notes: For the Creative Designer role, lacking Figma is a critical gap since it's a standard tool for design work. For the Events and Ministry Coordinator position, missing food safety and food preparation skills could hinder hands-on event logistics. Prioritize learning Figma through online tutorials and consider a basic food safety certification to address these gaps.

jobs.title: Creative Designer (Graphics & Video)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Adobe Creative Suite and Illustrator skills directly apply. Creative and communication skills support graphics and video work.
jobs.gaps: No explicit video editing experience listed. May need to demonstrate proficiency with video software.

jobs.title: Social-First Content & Design Specialist
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong fit for social-first content with creative, communication, and Adobe skills. Community outreach experience aids engagement.
jobs.gaps: No specific social media management or content strategy experience listed. May need to show examples of social content creation.

jobs.title: Events and Ministry Coordinator (Onsite, Volunteer)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Strong alignment with communication, community outreach, and teamwork skills. Experience in activities and public speaking supports event coordination.
jobs.gaps: No direct event planning or ministry experience listed. Volunteer role may require specific religious or organizational knowledge.

jobs.title: A&F Co. Design Sophomore Summit - Summer 2026
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Creative skills and Adobe Creative Suite proficiency are relevant. Interest in design and teamwork are assets.
jobs.gaps: No formal design education or portfolio mentioned. Summit likely requires current enrollment in design program and specific application materials.

jobs.title: Wine Steward PT
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Communication and teamwork skills are transferable to customer-facing role.
jobs.gaps: No wine knowledge or hospitality experience. Requires specific product expertise and possibly certification.
